name: Mississippi Mud Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups reduced fat milk chocolate frosting, melted
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Prepare a 13 x 9-inch pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside. In a mixing bowl, combine brownie mix, eggs, water, and oil. Stir until well blended. Spread into prepared pan. Bake for 25 minutes or until set. Spread marshmallow cream gently over hot brownies (see notes). Pour melted frosting over marshmallow cream. Swirl with knife to marble. Cool completely.
